launch · presale · hype

SlimeWire Launchpad

Launch your coin in one tap — or run a presale first to rally a crew and build hype. Every launch becomes a raid boss and a catchable Swamp creature, with alerts, share cards and radar exposure baked in.

🚀

Launch a Coin

Mint instantly on pump.fun via SlimeWire — name, ticker, image, dev buy. Do it on the site or right inside the Telegram bot.

Open the Launchpad →
🔥

Start a Presale

Post your coin early, set a hype goal + countdown, and let the crew pile in before it launches. Build the buzz, then send it.

Create a presale →
👹 Becomes a bossYour coin spawns as a live raid boss other traders fight.
🐸 Catchable creatureIt roams the Swamp as an ogre creature to catch.

Live Presales

+ New presale
🐸 SlimeWire · launch · presale · raid · read the playbook
Presales here are hype/allowlist for now — no funds are held. On-chain escrow with auto-refund is coming.

🔥 Start a Presale

Post your coin to the board to gather a crew before launch. No funds are collected — this builds the hype + allowlist.

When you're ready to go live, launch the coin from the Launchpad or the Telegram bot — your presale crew gets first dibs.
